## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" — or "n/a" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` / `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `master` and the commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` is clean.
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` is clean.
- [ ] `uv run mypy src/` passes (strict).
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes (or `-m "not integration"` if you can't run the model/DB locally — note which below).
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or public surface changed (README / CONTRIBUTING / tool docstrings).

## How verified

<!-- Commands you ran and what you observed. -->
